chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 904 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ مَنْ سَمِعَ اَلْأَذَانَ فَقَالَ كَمَا يَقُولُ اَلْمُؤَذِّنُ زِيدَ فِي رِزْقِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.904 - It is narrated: "Whoever hears the adhan (call to prayer) and repeats what the mu'adhdhin (caller to prayer) says will have an increase in their sustenance."
